rationale: X correctly identifies the exact root cause established by the thread: the default --run-level=core_model patches stage configs to load_format:dummy (extended to online serving via PR #4354, which X cites by number matching the ground truth comment), producing the garbage/repeated-token output, and prescribes the same fix (--run-level=full_model) that closed the issue as invalid. It grounds the claim in specific file/line citations and adds a reasonable follow-up suggestion. Y produced no answer at all, having hit its iteration limit and escalated, so it offers zero diagnostic or practical value.
